project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 19 Next.js/Fastify apps, 38 shared packages, pnpm workspaces, Turborepo
build_system: pnpm + Turborepo. `pnpm run typecheck` runs `turbo typecheck`. Individual apps: `tsc --noEmit`
test_framework: vitest with vi.fn() mocks, @testing-library/react for components. Tests in `__tests__/` dirs or `.test.ts` files
verification_instructions: 1. Run tsc --noEmit on each modified project. 2. Run vitest run to verify all 2770+ tests still pass. 3. Confirm no new errors introduced.
setup_instructions: Dependencies already installed via pnpm. Node.js 22+ required. NODE_OPTIONS='' must be used to bypass proxy-bootstrap.js issue.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network. NODE_OPTIONS must be cleared ('') before running tsc/vitest because of a proxy-bootstrap.js module error. No @prisma/client available (generates cascading errors in backend services). Apps 14-19 (quantpay, quantcloud, quantmaps, quanthealth, quantlearn, quantwork) are empty shells with only node_modules.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode, no any types, class-based services with DI, barrel exports, React components with props interfaces, vitest tests for new features
key_patterns: 1. Apps use Next.js app/ dir for frontend, backend/ for Fastify services, src/ for shared components/services. 2. tsconfig.json covers app/ (Next.js), tsconfig.backend.json covers backend/ + src/. 3. Emoji in JSX must use HTML entities (💬) or string expressions, NOT \u{XXXX} escapes. 4. Tests use vitest with mock prisma pattern. 5. Root tsconfig has noUncheckedIndexedAccess and noUnusedLocals enabled.
directory_structure: Root: turbo.json, tsconfig.json, package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml. apps/: 19 app dirs (quantchat, quantmail, quantsync, etc.). packages/: 38 shared packages (shared-ui, common, auth, ai, realtime, etc.). services/: microservice workers.
